creator: otacilio.neto@ee.ufcg.edu.br
text:
I approve the patch

On 25/08/2012 18:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of cad/p5-Verilog-Perl,
>
> Please note that PR ports/171063 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/171063
>
